goblin_menace.name: Goblin Menace
goblin_menace.description: The goblins near Rivermeet have grown bolder. Thin their numbers before they threaten the town.
goblin_menace.dialog_offer: Those wretched goblins have been raiding my supply caravans! Kill five of them and I'll make it worth your while.
goblin_menace.dialog_progress: Still at it? Keep hunting those goblins — I can't restock until the roads are safe.
goblin_menace.dialog_complete: Five goblins down! The roads should be safer now. Here's your reward, well earned.

goblin_ears.name: Proof of the Hunt
goblin_ears.description: Collect goblin ears as proof of your kills. The town council is offering bounties.
goblin_ears.dialog_offer: The town council wants proof that the goblin threat is being dealt with. Bring me four goblin ears and I'll pass along the bounty.
goblin_ears.dialog_progress: Got any ears for me yet? The council won't pay without proof.
goblin_ears.dialog_complete: That's all four! Disgusting, but the council will be satisfied. Here's your bounty.

quest_item.name: Goblin Ear
quest_item.description: A severed goblin ear, proof of a kill.

orc_raiders.name: Orc Raiders
orc_raiders.description: Orcs from the Whispering Woods are raiding travelers. Put a stop to their aggression.
orc_raiders.dialog_offer: Orcs have been spotted in the woods. They're getting too close to town. Slay three of them as a warning to the rest.
orc_raiders.dialog_progress: Those orcs won't stop until they learn to fear us. Keep fighting.
orc_raiders.dialog_complete: Three orcs felled! That should make them think twice. Take this reward.

troll_tusks.name: Troll Tusks
troll_tusks.description: Troll tusks are prized by alchemists. Collect some from the watchtower trolls.
troll_tusks.dialog_offer: An alchemist friend of mine needs troll tusks for a healing compound. Collect three from the watchtower trolls and I'll split the payment with you.
troll_tusks.dialog_progress: Any luck with those troll tusks? My alchemist friend is getting impatient.
troll_tusks.dialog_complete: Three tusks! These are perfect. The alchemist will be thrilled. Here's your share.

quest_item.name: Troll Tusk
quest_item.description: A large tusk from a troll, valued by alchemists.

salamander_scourge.name: Salamander Scourge
salamander_scourge.description: Fire Salamanders threaten the mountain pass. Eliminate them before they block all travel.
salamander_scourge.dialog_offer: The mountain routes are ablaze with Fire Salamanders. My caravans can't get through. Kill four of them and clear the way.
salamander_scourge.dialog_progress: The mountain pass still burns. Keep hunting those salamanders.
salamander_scourge.dialog_complete: Four salamanders vanquished! The mountain pass should cool down now. Well done.

serpent_scales.name: Serpent Scales
serpent_scales.description: Sea Serpent scales can be forged into powerful armor. Collect some from the sunken temple.
serpent_scales.dialog_offer: A master smith I know can forge Sea Serpent scales into enchanted armor. Bring me five scales and I'll commission a piece for you.
serpent_scales.dialog_progress: Those scales won't collect themselves. The sunken temple is crawling with serpents.
serpent_scales.dialog_complete: Five beautiful scales! The smith will craft something magnificent. And here's your payment.

quest_item.name: Serpent Scale
quest_item.description: An iridescent scale from a Sea Serpent, prized by smiths.

wraith_hunt.name: Wraith Hunt
wraith_hunt.description: Shadow Wraiths are spreading fear across the land. Banish them back to the darkness.
wraith_hunt.dialog_offer: Shadow Wraiths have been terrorizing travelers at night. Banish six of them and I'll pay handsomely.
wraith_hunt.dialog_progress: The wraiths still haunt the roads. Keep banishing them.
wraith_hunt.dialog_complete: Six wraiths banished! The night feels safer already. You've earned every coin of this.

void_essence.name: Void Essence
void_essence.description: Collect essence from Void Fiends to help seal the rift between worlds.
void_essence.dialog_offer: The scholars need Void Essence to seal Malachar's rifts. Harvest four from the Void Fiends — if you dare.
void_essence.dialog_progress: The rifts grow wider. We need that Void Essence urgently.
void_essence.dialog_complete: Four vials of Void Essence! The scholars can begin the sealing ritual. You may have saved us all.

quest_item.name: Void Essence
quest_item.description: A swirling vial of dark energy from a Void Fiend.

shadow_knights.name: Shadow Knight Purge
shadow_knights.description: Malachar's Shadow Knights guard the fortress. Cut through their ranks.
shadow_knights.dialog_offer: Malachar's Shadow Knights are his last line of defense. Slay five of them to weaken his forces before the final assault.
shadow_knights.dialog_progress: The Shadow Knights still stand guard. We need their numbers reduced.
shadow_knights.dialog_complete: Five Shadow Knights slain! Malachar's defenses crumble. This reward barely covers what you've risked.
